title: Maximum Subarray
problem_statement: Given an integer array nums, find the contiguous subarray with the largest sum and return its sum.

examples.explanation: The subarray [4,-1,2,1] has the maximum sum.
Single element array returns that element.

intuition: At each index, decide whether to extend the current subarray or start a new one. Track the maximum sum so far.

approaches.name: Kadane’s Algorithm
approaches.description: Maintain a running sum and reset it when it becomes negative, while recording the best sum seen.

interview_qa.q: Why start with nums[0] instead of 0?
interview_qa.a: If all numbers are negative, starting from 0 would give an incorrect answer of 0 instead of the true maximum negative sum.

interview_qa.q: How can you recover the subarray itself?
interview_qa.a: Track the temporary start index when resetting currentSum, and update best start/end positions whenever maxSum improves.
